raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "affirmative self-declaration of value alignment and intentional orientation",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a meaningful distinction exists between thriving and coping as actionable states",
    "individuals possess sufficient agency to choose nourishing options and expansion",
    "vitality is a reachable default condition rather than an exceptional one",
    "survival-mode functioning is suboptimal and can be superseded"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent; each clause reinforces a single growth-oriented polarity without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker possesses adequate external resources and safety to enact the declared choices; the statement functions as a private or communal intention rather than a prescriptive universal",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "structural barriers (poverty, illness, oppression) render the asserted agency illusory; the language is deployed to shame those still in coping or survival modes"
}
